description_long: This is a Maruchan Instant Lunch ramen cup, specifically the 'Con Camarón' (with shrimp) flavor, encased in a cardboard sleeve with a predominantly pink and yellow color scheme. The front of the package features a vibrant image of the ramen with visible noodles, shrimp, and vegetables, along with a metallic spoon. The cardboard sleeve is printed with branding, nutritional information, and preparation instructions in Spanish, and has a cutout at the top revealing the cup inside. The cup itself is made of white foam with printed branding visible through the sleeve. The overall shape is a tall, cylindrical cup with a slightly flared rim, designed for single-serving instant ramen. The packaging is lightweight and disposable, typical for convenience food products.
description: A Maruchan Instant Lunch ramen cup in a pink and yellow cardboard sleeve, featuring shrimp ramen imagery and Spanish text. The cup is cylindrical, made of foam, and partially visible through the packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Maruchan branding, shrimp ramen image, and product details in Spanish on a pink and yellow sleeve.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the foam cup inside the sleeve, with the Maruchan logo visible through the cutout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying nutritional information, preparation instructions, and additional branding on the cardboard sleeve.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the foam cup and sleeve cutout from a different angle.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is a tall, cylindrical foam cup with a slightly flared rim, encased in a printed cardboard sleeve. The sleeve is decorated with bright pink and yellow colors, bold Maruchan branding, and product imagery. The cup itself is plain white with printed text, and the sleeve features a cutout at the top for easy access.
attribute_topping_arrangement: The toppings, including shrimp and vegetables, are visually arranged on the surface of the noodles in a scattered yet balanced manner, as depicted in the product image. The shrimp pieces are grouped near the center, while green vegetables and other toppings are distributed around them for an appetizing presentation.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are prominently displayed above the broth and toppings, making them highly visible in the product image. They appear to be partially exposed and slightly heaped above the surface.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth appears somewhat cloudy and opaque, with visible floating particles and oil, suggesting a rich and flavorful soup base.
attribute_utensil_presence: A metallic spoon is present in the product image, positioned scooping up noodles from the bowl. No other utensils are visible.
